name: the-interfold-governance
description: The Interfold governance monorepo — app (frontend) + contracts (Foundry).

scripts.format: prettier --write "./*.{md,json,yml,yaml}" && (cd app && bun run format:fix) && (cd contracts && forge fmt)
scripts.lint: prettier --check "./*.{md,json,yml,yaml}" && (cd app && bun run lint) && (cd contracts && forge fmt --check)
